---
title: "EPPS 6323 Knowledge Mining | Spring 2026"
format: html
---

## Group Project
### Public Trust in Banks and Financial Institutions: A Knowledge Mining Approach
Made in collaboration with the brilliant minds of Soha Arian, Kasra Akbari, and Eman Ajmal.

#### Project Proposal
<details>

<summary><strong>Or Click to Show/Hide Proposal</strong></summary>

<iframe src="6323ProjectProposal.pdf" width="100%" height="800px" style="border: none; margin-top: 1em;">

</iframe>

</details>

#### Pitch Deck
<details>

<summary><strong>Or Click to Show/Hide Pitch Deck</strong></summary>

<iframe src="6323PitchDeck.pdf" width="100%" height="800px" style="border: none; margin-top: 1em;">

</iframe>

</details>

## Reflections

## Individual Assignments

-   [Assignment 1 - February 10th, 2026](6323-A1.qmd)
-   [Assignment 2 - February 17th, 2026](6323-A2.qmd)
-   [Assignment 3 - March 24th, 2026](6323-A3.qmd)
